title: Xtra Flaky Brazilian Chicken Skillet
description: A herbal and flaky Brazilian dish featuring worcestershire sauce, served in a stone bowl, perfect for a romantic dinner. This flexitarian friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large stone bowl or skillet over medium high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to brown.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until it is browned and cooked through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the worcestershire sauce, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Pour the sauce over the chicken and onions, and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and eggs to make a flaky crust mixture.
Pour the crust mixture over the chicken and sauce, and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the crust is golden brown.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the skillet for 5 minutes, until the crust is crispy and the sauce is bubbly.
